checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /signin — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, chatgpt, anthropic, claude, google-extended, ccbot
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~5 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: WebPage
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1186 divs with only 32 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 259/347 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 0/1 inputs have names, 1/1 have types
Found 1298 elements with stable test selectors
Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
No h1 heading — page lacks a clear title for agents
4 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 298/302 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~129,106 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 3% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 21 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~8,838 tokens (7% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.16–$1.94 per load ($0.81–$9.68 for a 5-page session)
132 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
56/115 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
3 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 70ms
Moderate payload: 505KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 18 scripts
Compression enabled: gzip

checks.name: agents_txt
findings: No agents.txt found — agents have no machine-readable permission manifest

checks.name: a2a
findings: No A2A Agent Card found (/.well-known/agent.json) — agents can't discover this service's capabilities

findings: No x402 discovery endpoint found
